channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Dangerous paving on the stairs, 7th March
item.description:
For a few months now the paving slabs have been broken and people are tripping . It is a liability
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Maria Close, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Someone has left rubbish by the bin, looks like wood, 7th March
item.description:
For at least 4 months there has been wood in the chamber so we cannot put the bin where it should be
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Maria Close, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping concrete bag and door, 7th March
item.description:
Someone has left a bag of concrete and a random door in the shed of number 3. Now the residents want to use it and can't. Flytipping and tresspassing is illegal.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Maria Close, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken Utility hole cover with uncovered hole. Serious, dangerous trip hazard, 7th March
item.description:
Outside Memsaab restaurant on Lordship Lane at the junction with Matham Grove there is a broken utilities cover ?water. This is just the right size for a small foot to go straight in and cause a nasty fracture and degloving injury. It needs to be fixed immediately. A stick has been placed in the hole to try to alert people to the hazard.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 44, Lordship Lane, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bin full, 7th March
item.description:
Please empty

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ethelbert Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytip, 7th March
item.description:
York Grove at entrance to parking area of Pomeroy Streer Eatate. Please clear flytip

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): York Grove, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped small suitcase, 7th March
item.description:
Please collect

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ridley Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Please remove, 7th March
item.description:
Please remove

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Nightingale Court, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sign missing - all packages going to wrong place, 7th March
item.description:
The sign for maria close 1-3 is missing, as a result all our packages are being delivered elsewhere. This has been the case for about 6 months
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Maria Close, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Black bins not emptied, 7th March
item.description:
Black bins are still not emptied. You said: This issue will be resolved during the next, scheduled, weekly cleanse. But they are scheduled to be emptied every two weeks! A full month without general waste being emptied is a health and environment risk due to rats and fly tipping in the area. Bins are already at maximum capacity. Please sort out a collection next week. And stop flagging everything as solved. Because it is not solved.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Gadwall Way, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Regularly overflowing bins, 7th March
item.description:
Could the Ed and Enforcement Officer cone to look at this site and speak with businesses and residents please.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Well Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Uncovered utilities hole. Very dangerous, 7th March
item.description:
There is an uncovered utilities hole in the middle of the pavement outside Tesco express on the corner of Crawthew Grove and Lordship Lane SE22. This hole is just the right size for a small foot to go straight in it and cause a very nasty fracture and degloving injury. It needs to be covered as a matter of urgency. I don't which utility it is, possibly water.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 29-35, Lordship Lane, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytop, 7th March
item.description:
Outsidd Jinipter House. Please clear flytip of a table and wooden init

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Coll's Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole, 7th March
item.description:
Pothole is now the width of the road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Oxhawth Crescent, Petts Wood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Black bins not emptied, 7th March
item.description:
Despite you flagging my previous report as fixed, the Black Bins are still not emptied. Please stop lying and flagging issues as fixed when clearly the bins have not been emptied.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Nuthatch Gardens, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Black bins not emptied, 7th March
item.description:
The black bins have not been emptied on the whole street!
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Nuthatch Gardens, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped mattress base (double), 7th March
item.description:
Please remove as soon as possible.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Duchy Street, Waterloo, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large deep pothole, 7th March
item.description:
Has been here for 2 months and getting worse by the day. Right in centre of road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 64, Friar Road, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light still not working, 7th March
item.description:
Reported on 3rd March 2026 ref no 9033329 says has been fixed still not working
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Windsor Close, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish, 7th March
item.description:
There is rubbish dumped from cars along the kerbside on both sides of St Andrews Drive and also near the drains rubbish which needs sweeping on a regular basis. This is an eyesore for the area but is just ignored and used as a dumping ground.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): St. Andrew's Drive, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
